channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: The latest exchange of airstrikes by the U.S. and Iran repre…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The latest exchange of airstrikes by the U.S. and Iran represents some of the heaviest bombardment they have carried out since reaching a cease-fire agreement last month. Here’s a breakdown of the latest attacks.
item.content:encoded: The latest exchange of airstrikes by the U.S. and Iran represents some of the heaviest bombardment they have carried out since reaching a cease-fire agreement last month. Here’s a breakdown of the latest attacks.

item.title: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今…
item.author: katokich (@katokich.bsky.social)
item.description: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる
item.content:encoded: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる

item.title: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, res…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, responded to a White House report that calls the National Museum of American History driven by "a radical, activist ideology." n.pr/4bfEYb4
item.content:encoded: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, responded to a White House report that calls the National Museum of American History driven by "a radical, activist ideology." n.pr/4bfEYb4

item.title: In this episode you'll learn ・How avant-garde jazz emerged …
item.author: mmr (@mmr3cords.bsky.social)
item.description:
In this episode you'll learn

・How avant-garde jazz emerged from traditional jazz
・Why Ornette Coleman transformed improvisation
・The innovations of Cecil Taylor, Albert Ayler, and John Coltrane

#AvantGardeJazz
#FreeJazz
#OrnetteColeman

youtu.be/QtAvjGZRf9o
item.content:encoded:
In this episode you'll learn

・How avant-garde jazz emerged from traditional jazz
・Why Ornette Coleman transformed improvisation
・The innovations of Cecil Taylor, Albert Ayler, and John Coltrane

#AvantGardeJazz
#FreeJazz
#OrnetteColeman

youtu.be/QtAvjGZRf9o

item.title: Meta on Thursday unveiled a new version of its flagship A.I.…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Meta on Thursday unveiled a new version of its flagship A.I. model, Muse Spark, in an effort to close the gap with its rivals in the global race to develop the technology.
item.content:encoded: Meta on Thursday unveiled a new version of its flagship A.I. model, Muse Spark, in an effort to close the gap with its rivals in the global race to develop the technology.

item.title: This entertaining three-part docuseries follows a Tennessee …
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: This entertaining three-part docuseries follows a Tennessee high-school class as they investigate a series of unsolved crimes from the 1980s known as the Redhead Murders. on.wsj.com/4aNKMsi
item.content:encoded: This entertaining three-part docuseries follows a Tennessee high-school class as they investigate a series of unsolved crimes from the 1980s known as the Redhead Murders. on.wsj.com/4aNKMsi

item.title: #🔖学び デザイナー以外でも、Claude Codeでデザインを作れるために取り組んだこと｜坪田 朋 クラシルで、C…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖学び
デザイナー以外でも、Claude Codeでデザインを作れるために取り組んだこと｜坪田 朋

クラシルで、CPOをしている坪田です。 この記事は、「デザインハーネス」イベントで登壇した内容をnoteにしたものです。 チャレンジしたのは「Claude CodeでUIデザインを作りきれるか」。 「ハーネス」という仕組みを作ったことで、デザイナーではないPdMやエンジニアがClaude Codeでデザインシステム（DS）に沿ったUIを...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖学び
デザイナー以外でも、Claude Codeでデザインを作れるために取り組んだこと｜坪田 朋

クラシルで、CPOをしている坪田です。 この記事は、「デザインハーネス」イベントで登壇した内容をnoteにしたものです。 チャレンジしたのは「Claude CodeでUIデザインを作りきれるか」。 「ハーネス」という仕組みを作ったことで、デザイナーではないPdMやエンジニアがClaude Codeでデザインシステム（DS）に沿ったUIを...

item.title: 【今日の天気予報】 今日10日(金)は台風9号が先島諸島に近づいてきます。沖縄では雨や風が強まり、先島諸島を中心に大荒れ…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日の天気予報】
今日10日(金)は台風9号が先島諸島に近づいてきます。沖縄では雨や風が強まり、先島諸島を中心に大荒れとなる見込みです。
九州から東北にかけては晴れて厳しい暑さになるところが多く、熱中症対策が欠かせません。北海道は雨の降りやすい天気です。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【今日の天気予報】
今日10日(金)は台風9号が先島諸島に近づいてきます。沖縄では雨や風が強まり、先島諸島を中心に大荒れとなる見込みです。
九州から東北にかけては晴れて厳しい暑さになるところが多く、熱中症対策が欠かせません。北海道は雨の降りやすい天気です。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.author: Theo - t3.gg {bot} (@theo-t3gg.bsky.social)
item.description:

Gonna do first 1 or 2 offline, then maybe I'll go live? Y'all down for a late stream ~4pm?
item.content:encoded:
Time to start recording. I have a lot to film.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 米、エネルギー施設攻撃を容認「終戦に寄与」 ロシア猛反発 【7月9日 AFP】ロシアは9日、ウクライ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
米、エネルギー施設攻撃を容認「終戦に寄与」 ロシア猛反発

【7月9日 AFP】ロシアは9日、ウクライナによるロシアのエネルギー施設への攻撃が戦争終結に寄与する可能性があるとの見解を示した米国に対し、激しく反発した。 ウクライナは最近、長距離攻撃が可能な無人機を用いてロシアのエネルギーおよび軍事施設に対する攻撃を展開している。こうした攻撃については、ロシア軍がウ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
米、エネルギー施設攻撃を容認「終戦に寄与」 ロシア猛反発

【7月9日 AFP】ロシアは9日、ウクライナによるロシアのエネルギー施設への攻撃が戦争終結に寄与する可能性があるとの見解を示した米国に対し、激しく反発した。 ウクライナは最近、長距離攻撃が可能な無人機を用いてロシアのエネルギーおよび軍事施設に対する攻撃を展開している。こうした攻撃については、ロシア軍がウ...

item.title: A railway conductor on a Tennessee tourist attraction was fi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A railway conductor on a Tennessee tourist attraction was fired after his comments telling non-Americans they “can leave” were captured on video and went viral on TikTok.
item.content:encoded: A railway conductor on a Tennessee tourist attraction was fired after his comments telling non-Americans they “can leave” were captured on video and went viral on TikTok.

item.title: 03/2010 - 07/2026 💔 Mummokoiran matka tuli päätökseen tänä…
item.author: Mikko (@rmikko.bsky.social)
item.description:
03/2010 - 07/2026 💔

Mummokoiran matka tuli päätökseen tänään. Pää oli edelleen terävä, mutta kroppa ei enää oikein jaksanut pysyä perässä.
item.content:encoded:
03/2010 - 07/2026 💔

Mummokoiran matka tuli päätökseen tänään. Pää oli edelleen terävä, mutta kroppa ei enää oikein jaksanut pysyä perässä.

item.title: The House’s Epstein investigation will hit the one-year mark…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for t…
item.author: Maria J Pérez Cuervo (@mjpcuervo.com)
item.description: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”
item.content:encoded: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”

item.title: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evi…
item.author: Jonathan W. Gray (@elmcitytree.blacksky.app)
item.description: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬
item.content:encoded: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬

item.title: WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue. …
item.author: leftylady.bsky.social (@leftylady.bsky.social)
item.description:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)
item.content:encoded:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)

item.title: Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) s…
item.author: Acid Rain (@bearysweet.bsky.social)
item.description:
Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) swarm a kayak by the Vagran River in the Ural Mountains of Russia.

🦋

The butterflies are attracted to the salt from human sweat on the kayaker's gear and clothing.

This happens in early summer when these butterflies emerge.

#butterfly
item.content:encoded:
Dozens of Black-Veined White butterflies (Aporia crataeai) swarm a kayak by the Vagran River in the Ural Mountains of Russia.

🦋

The butterflies are attracted to the salt from human sweat on the kayaker's gear and clothing.

This happens in early summer when these butterflies emerge.

#butterfly

item.title: Hi everyone! It’s been a while! Behind the scenes I’m still…
item.author: Sarah Andersen (@sarahseeandersen.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hi everyone! It’s been a while!

Behind the scenes I’m still hard at work, plugging away at two (!) different books that I can’t wait for you to see. While working on these new series has been an exciting challenge, I definitely miss Sarah’s Scribbles...
item.content:encoded:
Hi everyone! It’s been a while!

Behind the scenes I’m still hard at work, plugging away at two (!) different books that I can’t wait for you to see. While working on these new series has been an exciting challenge, I definitely miss Sarah’s Scribbles...

item.title: An out of the way relaxing gem - Patagonia-Sonoita Creek Pre…
item.author: Tramonte's TrailPhotos (@tramontes-t-photos.bsky.social)
item.description:
An out of the way relaxing gem - Patagonia-Sonoita Creek Preserve run by Nature Conservancy in southern #Arizona near the Mexican border around Nogales. Feels almost like central plains with hills - Cottonwood trees turning yellow, a stream, and grasslands. For #ColorADay #YellowThu.

#ECK #hiking
item.content:encoded:
An out of the way relaxing gem - Patagonia-Sonoita Creek Preserve run by Nature Conservancy in southern #Arizona near the Mexican border around Nogales. Feels almost like central plains with hills - Cottonwood trees turning yellow, a stream, and grasslands. For #ColorADay #YellowThu.

#ECK #hiking

item.title: If I could have a magic box that would let my cats understan…
item.author: John Scalzi (@scalzi.com)
item.description: If I could have a magic box that would let my cats understand me for only one sentence, that sentence would be, "For fuck's sake, throw up on the bare floor and not on the goddamn carpet"
item.content:encoded: If I could have a magic box that would let my cats understand me for only one sentence, that sentence would be, "For fuck's sake, throw up on the bare floor and not on the goddamn carpet"
